content.problemStatement:
Alice just invited Bob to come over for dinner at her place. Bob is not dressed properly and he does not wish to take any chances, so he wants to rush to an apartment of one of his NNN friends, change there and meet Alice for the dinner.

Alice and Bob's friends live in a skyscraper with many floors. Alice lives on the aaa-th floor, the apartments of Bob's friends are located on the floors F1,F2,…,FNF_1, F_2, \ldots, F_NF1​,F2​,…,FN​ and Bob is initially at the bbb-th floor. It takes exactly 111 minute to go one floor up or down from each floor.

Bob needs exactly ccc minutes to change in any of his friends' apartments. Find the minimum time he needs to go to one of his friends' apartments, change and get to Alice's apartment.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T. Each test case contains four space-separated integers N, a, b, and c. The second line contains N space-separated integers F1, F2, ..., FN.
content.outputFormat: Print a single line containing one integer — the minimum time Bob needs.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Example case 1: In the optimal solution, Bob goes to his friend at floor 6, changes there and goes to meet Alice. The total time is (6−5)(6-5)(6−5) to reach his friend plus 222 to change plus (6−1)(6-1)(6−1) to reach Alice, which is 1+2+5=81+2+5 = 81+2+5=8 minutes.
Example case 2: Bob is already at Alice's apartment, so the time is 0.

Example case 3: Bob goes to his friend at floor 1, changes there and goes to meet Alice. The total time is (1−1)(1-1)(1−1) to reach his friend plus 111 to change plus (1−1)(1-1)(1−1) to reach Alice, which is 0+1+0=1+1+0=2 minutes.

solution.approach: For each test case, we iterate over the floors of Bob's friends and calculate the time it takes to go to each friend's apartment, change, and then go to Alice's apartment. We keep track of the minimum time found so far and print it at the end.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N * log(max(a, b, c))) where N is the number of test cases
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) as we only use a constant amount of space

code.Python3:
import sys

T = int(input())
while T > 0:
    N, a, b, c = map(int, input().split())
    floors = list(map(int, input().split()))
    min_time = float('inf')
    for i in range(N):
        j = floors[i]
        min_time = min(min_time, (j > b ? j - b : b - j) + c + (a > j ? a - j : j - a))
    print(min_time)
    T -= 1
